pi_items.source: Codebase search - file does not exist in /examples/microsoft_excel_2010_env/data/ or anywhere in repository
Windows path reference - cannot verify without access to Windows environment. File does not exist in repository.
AM Best Market Segment Report (2024) and S&P Global analysis - Private Passenger Auto 2022 actual combined ratio reached 15-year high of 110.1%
Insurance Information Institute (III) 2018 year-end financial results - Calendar Year 2018 private carrier combined ratio for workers compensation was 83%, the lowest since the 1930s
S&P Global Market Intelligence (2023) - Commercial auto combined ratio for 2022 was 105.5%, a 4.1-point deterioration from 101.4% forecast
Cannot verify without access to actual Excel file containing all 7 lines of business data. Value appears fabricated given contradictions in other claims.
Task description explicitly states 'Use formulas for all calculations' and verifier.py checks for formula presence in cells (row=4, column=4) and (row=26, column=2)
Verifier only checks 2 specific cells for formulas; does not implement percentage validation. Task description does not specify this percentage.

privileged_info_summary: The task claims to analyze P&C insurance profitability metrics for 2018-2022 using a workbook file 'pc_industry_ratios.xlsx', but this file does not exist in the repository. The expected combined ratio values in metadata are contradicted by verified industry data: Private Passenger Auto 2022 actual CR was 110.1% (not 102.21%), Workers Compensation 2018 actual CR was 83.0% (not 85.0%), and Commercial Auto 2022 actual CR was 105.5% (not 101.68%). The task requires formula-based calculations across three sheets (Ratio_Analysis, Performance_Summary, and supporting data sheets) and the verifier checks specific cell calculations, but the underlying data values appear to be synthetic.
